# TJS Design — Custom Websites for Local Service Businesses

## What is TJS Design?
TJS Design is a custom web design service run by Trevor Spencer, a web designer and digital marketing expert based in Salt Lake City, Utah. TJS Design builds fully custom, mobile-responsive, SEO-optimized websites exclusively for local service businesses — from plumbers and roofers to electricians, landscapers, handymen, auto repair shops, and cleaning services. Trevor has 12+ years of experience in product management, digital marketing, and sales at companies including Red Hat, Podium, Pluralsight, and Domo.

## What makes TJS Design different?
- Every website is built 100% from scratch — no templates, no drag-and-drop builders, no off-the-shelf layouts
- One expert handles everything start to finish — design, development, SEO, AEO, analytics, and launch
- Flat-rate pricing: $999.99 one-time, no hidden fees
- Free hosting ($0/year), using GitHub Pages — no ongoing platform costs
- Delivered in under 14 business days from the intake call
- Includes full on-page SEO, structured data (JSON-LD), AEO optimization, Google Search Console indexing, Bing Webmaster Tools, and Google Analytics 4 setup — all included

## Services

### Custom Website Build — $999.99 (one-time)
A fully custom, mobile-ready, SEO-optimized website built specifically for your local service business. Includes:
- Custom design (no templates)
- Mobile-responsive layout
- On-page SEO (metadata, structured data, canonical tags)
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) for Google AI Overview, ChatGPT, and Perplexity
- Google Search Console setup and sitemap submission
- Bing Webmaster Tools registration
- Google Analytics 4 integration
- Free hosting via GitHub Pages ($0/year)
- Delivered in under 14 business days

### Ongoing Site Management — $129.99/month or $999.96/year ($83.33/month)
Optional ongoing management for business owners who want their site fully handled after launch. Includes:
- One 30-minute update call per month
- Unlimited content and copy updates
- 24/7 direct support via phone, text, and email
- Full site maintenance and monitoring
- Ongoing analytics review
- Cancel anytime (monthly plan) or save $560/year with annual billing

## How It Works (4 steps)
1. Purchase & Schedule — Pay online and immediately book your 30-minute intake call during checkout
2. Intake Call — 30-minute session covering your services, brand, customers, and goals
3. Design Reviews — Receive 1–3 design previews; request changes until you approve
4. Launch — Site goes live, indexed in Google and Bing, analytics connected, fully operational

## Who TJS Design Serves
Local service businesses of all types, including:
- Plumbers and plumbing companies
- Roofers and roofing contractors
- Electricians and electrical contractors
- HVAC technicians and companies
- Landscapers and lawn care businesses
- Handymen and general contractors
- Auto repair shops and mechanics
- Cleaning services and house cleaners
- Painters, pressure washers, pest control, and more
- Any local service business, nationwide

## Pricing Summary
- Custom Website Build: $999.99 (one-time)
- Hosting: $0/year (free, included forever)
- Domain: ~$10–$25/year (purchased separately by client; client owns it outright)
- Site Management: $129.99/month or $999.96/year (optional)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does a website from TJS Design cost?
A: A custom website costs a flat $999.99 one-time fee. Hosting is $0/year. The optional Site Management plan is $129.99/month or $83.33/month billed annually.

Q: How long does it take?
A: Under 14 business days from the intake call, guaranteed.

Q: What do I need to provide?
A: Very little. The intake call covers everything — your services, branding, photos, and goals. No logo? That's fine too.

Q: Does TJS Design do SEO?
A: Yes. Every website includes full on-page SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), structured data (JSON-LD), Google Search Console setup, Bing Webmaster Tools, and GA4 — all included in the $999.99 rate.

Q: What is AEO?
A: AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) structures your site so AI-powered tools like Google's AI Overview, ChatGPT, and Perplexity can surface your business in answers. It works alongside traditional SEO.

Q: Is hosting really free?
A: Yes. TJS Design uses GitHub Pages, so hosting costs $0/year — forever. You only pay for your domain ($10–$25/year), which you own outright.

Q: Is the 14-day timeline guaranteed?
A: Yes, on TJS Design's end. The timeline starts from your intake call and is met every time as long as design feedback is provided within a reasonable window.

Q: Do I have to get the Site Management plan?
A: No. It's completely optional. Your site is fully live and functional without it.

## About Trevor Spencer
Trevor Spencer is the founder and sole operator of TJS Design. He has 12+ years of experience in digital marketing, product management, and sales at enterprise software companies. He founded TJS Design to give local service businesses access to professional, high-performance websites that actually generate leads — at a price point that makes sense for small businesses.
